items.name: Categgpult
items.description: Ultimate feline power in a tiny explosive shell. Be on the look out for the rogue Tabby.  Anybody close enough will be knocked back and dealt 40 damage.

items.name: Sword of the Summer Sun
items.description: The pain of a million sunburns...

items.name: Prehistoric Piercing Blade
items.description: Slash and lunge at your enemies to do 12 to 30 damage per hit.  Double click to jump in the air and tackle your enemy in true prehistoric fashion to do 35 to 60 damage. This blade gains power as you gain KOs. KO 5 other users to transform into a dinosaur and do double damange on all attacks!

items.name: Otterhead Longsword
items.description: And you thought the Otterhead Shortsword was cool!  Hit 'Q' to get the sword to spin in a circle and do 20 damage per hit. Otherwise, click to attack and do 10-15 damage per hit!

items.name: Stealth Ninja Potion
items.description: Turn into a stealth double jumping ninja!

items.name: Beach Umbrella Sword
items.description: To protect you from rain, but not enemies.

items.name: Giant Ice Bow
items.description: Winter is here and you’re ready to make sure everyone survives. This bow will freeze your foes and do a fair amount of damage.

items.name: Beef Wellington Launcher
items.description: Burgers are for the common folk, but beef wellington is next level delicious. In fact, they are so delicious that your foes will eat them until it's painful and does damage.

items.name: Epic Flail
items.description: Think I need a ginger ale. That is such an epic flail!  This flail deals 35 damage per hit and will knock your enemies back by 10 studs. Can't fail with this flail!

items.name: Attrition Blade
items.description: Your enemies won't last long with this blade on your side.

items.name: DIY Flying Contraption
items.description: Not too shabby for an DIY project, if I can say so myself.

items.name: Swordfish Sword
items.description: Ironically swordfish are pacifists who hate conflict. This one makes a very fine sword though, click to slash and lunge through enemies.

items.name: Roman Sword and Shield
items.description: FOR THE EMPIRE!

items.name: Attack Snake Staff
items.description: Click to summon a bunch of snakes around you which slither toward whatever location you desire.

items.name: Microscope Launcher
items.description: Don’t just spread germs, fire them!

items.name: Sword of the Waves
items.description: If the ocean waves, it's polite to wave back. Click to slash, keep clicking to unleash a watery torrent at your foes.

items.name: Sword Fish
items.description: Get it?  Cuz it's a sword...made of fish?

items.name: Stinky Skunk
items.description: This stinky guy will knock your foes to the ground!

items.name: Discus 2012
items.description: Throw this discus far enough and you'll get an explosive reward.

items.name: Sword of Fiery Justice
items.description: Use this sword for regular slash damage or send out fiery justice one flaming ball at a time.

items.name: Redcliff Ballista
items.description: Fire arrows from this giant powerful Redcliff Ballista and do 50 damage per hit.
